title: Senior Software Engineer - PharmEasy Ventures Solutions - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - PharmEasy Ventures Solutions - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at PharmEasy Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Coimbatore-based team.

About PharmEasy Ventures Solutions:
PharmEasy Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PharmEasy Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
